Review: This is a great product, easy to order, with a helpful range of payment options and an excellent delivery process.
Piece of cake to order from Samsung. Everything is so easy

Innovative and ultra reliable products, competitive prices and great deals, trade in deals to encourage recycling, long warranties for piece of mind, what more can you ask for? Always look to samsung for electronics, from mobiles, watches and tablets, to tvs, to fridge freezers and microwaves. Have 17 samsung products currently and always replace with samsung if they ever become outdated. They're so compatible and talk to other devices, allowing me to make the most of the new tech and features and most importantly things so much more convenient. Small unexpected things like the ai features on the tvs predicting what features you want to change to save you fumbling through menus just puts them so far in front of any other manufacturer. Everything designed around consumer needs

I recently upgraded to the Galaxy S26 Ultra and I’m honestly blown away by how good this phone is. The design feels incredibly premium and the display is absolutely stunning. The screen is bright, super smooth, and perfect for watching videos, gaming, or just everyday browsing.The camera system is easily one of the best features. The photos come out incredibly sharp with great colour and detail, even in low light. The zoom is also impressive – I was able to capture clear shots from really far away.Battery life has been excellent for me. It easily lasts a full day with heavy use including social media, videos, and taking lots of photos. Fast charging is also very convenient when I need a quick top-up.Performance is another highlight. Everything feels fast and smooth with no lag at all. Apps open instantly and multitasking is effortless. The S Pen is also a great addition and makes the phone even more useful for notes and quick edits.Overall, I’m extremely happy with the S26 Ultra. It’s powerful, reliable, and packed with features. If you’re thinking about upgrading, I would definitely recommend it. This is easily one of the best smartphones I’ve used.
Absolutely fantastic service. Delivered on time and cracking offers.  Highly recommended

The phone looks stunning and the performance is great.  The display is big and the privacy screen is really useful. The battery lasts really long and the camera is awesome. Only concern is that the placement of the camera makes it unstable when you leave it on the table.
easy to use web site and user friendly

Great product,ordered the wrong phone cos im an idiot and your pages for 26+ and 26 ultra look exactly the same and i used the wrong page. Still very happy with s26+ as the stylis and extra range on camera were whishes and not needed and it was a lot cheaper. Great service, arrived on time, easy to set delivery day. Would recomend but please make it clearer on web which phone your ordering to help idiots get the right one.

I am guessing they expect people to replace £4k tvs every 18m. Really poor customer service. Look online to see similar reviews. I have always bought Samsung - not anymore.
